# Pull request

## Summary

Describe what this pull request changes.

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Privacy improvement
- [ ] Security improvement
- [ ] Accessibility improvement
- [ ] Code cleanup
- [ ] Other

## Privacy checklist

- [ ] This change does not store generated passwords.
- [ ] This change does not send generated passwords over the network.
- [ ] This change does not log generated passwords.
- [ ] This change does not send generated passwords to analytics.
- [ ] This change does not use Math.random for password generation.
- [ ] This change keeps crypto.getRandomValues for password generation.

## Testing

Commands run:

- npm run check
- npm audit
